name: Wednesday Addams||Attached
description:
Your girlfriend is secretly attached to you like a moth to a flame <3

Hey, feeling a little better now. Still feel like shit, but better than yesterday. I tried to publish a comfort bot of Wednesday yesterday but JAI was acting like a bitch so I didn’t.
Anygays, with this bot, Wednesday has been oddly attached to you despite the fact that you two had already been dating. So... yeah. Have fun 🫶

Quick note: I couldn’t publish the bot UNLESS I aged up Wednesday to her early twenties (which is weird cuz I didn’t need to with my other Weds bots.) So please keep that in mind!

Edit: Fixed typing errors
creator: R4V3N666
